vocab.meaning: tối ưu hóa/hợp lý hóa quy trình làm việc
vocab.example: I frequently visit project management websites because they offer tools that significantly streamline my workflow.

vocab.meaning: các bài báo/nghiên cứu được chuyên gia thẩm định
vocab.example: As a student, I often navigate to digital libraries to access peer-reviewed articles for my assignments.
I try to limit my time on short-video platforms due to their highly addictive nature and infinite scrolling features.

vocab.meaning: môi trường giàu đa phương tiện (nhiều hình ảnh, video, âm thanh)
vocab.example: I prefer educational sites that provide a multimedia-rich environment, making complex theories much more digestible.

vocab.meaning: cập nhật/theo kịp tin tức hoặc xu hướng
vocab.example: I visit tech blogs daily to keep abreast of the latest advancements in artificial intelligence.
